starry_unigraph.runtime.online.cache module

Historical memory cache with adaptive sync threshold.

CTDGHistoricalCache caches the last-synced memory for shared nodes and uses cosine-distance change detection to skip redundant distributed syncs. AdaParameter auto-tunes the threshold based on the ratio of sync latency to compute latency.

class starry_unigraph.runtime.online.cache.AdaParameter(alpha: float = 0.5, min_alpha: float = 0.1, max_alpha: float = 0.95)[source]

Bases: object

Adaptive threshold for HistoricalCache — adjusts based on sync/compute latency ratio.

alpha: float = 0.5
max_alpha: float = 0.95
min_alpha: float = 0.1
update_from_latency(sync_ms: float, compute_ms: float) → None[source]

Tighten threshold when sync is cheap relative to compute; loosen otherwise.

class starry_unigraph.runtime.online.cache.CTDGHistoricalCache(num_shared: int, hidden_dim: int, device: str, num_nodes: int | None = None, shared_node_ids: torch.Tensor | None = None, ada_param: AdaParameter | None = None)[source]

Bases: object

Per-rank cache for shared-node memory snapshots.

Tracks the last-synced memory for shared nodes and provides a boolean mask indicating which nodes have changed enough to warrant a new sync.

bind_shared_nodes(num_nodes: int, shared_node_ids: Tensor) → None[source]

Bind fixed global shared-node IDs to cache slot indices.

historical_check(shared_node_local_indices: Tensor, current_memory: Tensor) → Tensor[source]

Check which shared nodes have drifted beyond the sync threshold.

Computes cosine distance between current and cached memory and returns True for nodes that exceed (1 - alpha).

Args:

shared_node_local_indices: Local node IDs of shared nodes, [S]. current_memory: Current memory vectors, [S, D].

Returns:

Boolean mask [S], True for nodes needing sync.

slot_indices(node_ids: Tensor) → Tensor[source]
synchronize_shared_update(received_node_ids: Tensor, received_values: Tensor, received_ts: Tensor) → None[source]

Apply received updates to cached snapshot, keeping only newer timestamps.

update_cache(shared_indices: Tensor, new_memory: Tensor, new_ts: Tensor) → None[source]

Update cache after a successful sync.
